name: Bob Cunningham
abstract: Bob Cunningham (December 28, 1934 – April 1, 2017) was an American jazz bassist. Cunningham was born on December 28, 1934, in Cleveland.

about_quotes.speaker: Yusef Lateef
about_quotes.evidence: the group at that time, we did a book called Something Else, with Kenneth Barron, Albert Heath, Bob Cunningham, myself.
about_quotes.doc_title: Yusef Lateef — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Frank Foster
about_quotes.evidence: Al Dailey and Virgil Jones, and whenever possible the late Alan Dawson on drums, and either Richard Davis or Bob Cunningham, someone like that on bass.
about_quotes.doc_title: Frank Foster — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Owens
about_quotes.evidence: I remember the first concert we—Bob Cunningham and myself went out to look for—well, we needed a stage.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jimmy Owens — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
